instructions.title: Template Usage
instructions.content: This PSD is a templatised master. Do not modify layers prefixed with SACRED_. Use Smart Objects for element swaps.

instructions.title: Layer Naming
instructions.content: All layers follow UPPER_SNAKE_CASE convention: SACRED_ (locked), FLEXIBLE_ (editable), SKU_ (product swap).

instructions.title: Automation Compatibility
instructions.content: Automation scripts target layers by name prefix. Do not rename layers without updating the automation configuration.
